tomato_diseases.late_blight: Fungal pathogen Phytophthora infestans. Appears as dark spots on leaves with white spore rings underneath. High spread risk under humid conditions.
tomato_diseases.bacterial_spot: Bacterial pathogen Xanthomonas. Causes small, dark brown spots. Sprays of copper-based bactericides may assist, alongside sanitation.

apple_diseases.scab: Fungal pathogen Venturia inaequalis. Causes olive-brown spots. Prune canopy to promote quick leaf drying.
